creator: ivalentine@arizona.edu
text:
Created attachment 255148
devel/rubygem-nori: Update to 2.7

Would like to have this version for a port update I'm working on.

Poudriere test build succeeds at building sysutils/rubygem-winrm and www/rubygem-savon on 13.3, 13.4, and 14.1 using this patch. I didn't test actual functionality, but the gemspecs look good.
